entity.summary: United States-based global cryptocurrency exchange launched by LINE on 2020-02-27. BITFRONT announced a voluntary wind-down on 2022-11-28, halted trading and deposits on 2022-12-30, and kept withdrawals available until 2023-03-31.
entity.notes: HEI uses 2022-12-30 as the terminal exchange date because trading and deposits ended then. The later 2023-03-31 withdrawal deadline is retained as a residual wind-down function.

events.title: LINE launched BITFRONT in the United States
events.description: LINE opened BITFRONT as a United States-based global cryptocurrency exchange for its international token ecosystem.

events.title: BITFRONT announced an orderly closure
events.description: BITFRONT stopped new registrations and announced a staged wind-down, stating that the decision would allow LINE to focus on developing its blockchain ecosystem.
events.notes: The closure announcement stated that it was unrelated to misconduct involving certain exchanges accused at the time.

events.title: BITFRONT halted trading and deposits
events.description: BITFRONT ended trading, crypto and U.S. dollar deposits, and open API service on 2022-12-30. Withdrawals remained available until 2023-03-31.
events.notes: HEI uses the end of trading as the death marker; withdrawal access was a residual wind-down function.

evidence.title: LINE launches cryptocurrency exchange BITFRONT in the United States
evidence.notes: Primary LINE release states service began on 2020-02-27.

evidence.title: BITFRONT launches interest product with Celsius Network
evidence.notes: Primary retrospective LINE source again identifies the exchange service start date as 2020-02-27.

evidence.title: Crypto exchange Bitfront shuts down
evidence.notes: Reuters report confirms the November 28 closure announcement and staged withdrawal deadline.

evidence.title: Line-owned crypto exchange Bitfront to shut down by March 2023
evidence.notes: Independent report describing the staged closure schedule.

evidence.title: LINE to exit global cryptocurrency trading and close BITFRONT
evidence.notes: Reports that all trading would stop on 2022-12-30 and withdrawals on 2023-03-31.

evidence.title: BITFRONT crypto exchange will cease operations in 2023
evidence.notes: Preserves the detailed December 30 trading and deposit cutoff and March 31 withdrawal cutoff.
